Class SimulationDeviceState

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.SimulationDeviceState
public class SimulationDeviceState extends Object
Represents a simulated device state used only inside the time-lapse replay.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationDeviceState

      public SimulationDeviceState(String deviceName, String room, String type, String state, String lastChanged)
      Creates a simulated snapshot entry for a device.
      Parameters:
      deviceName - device display name
      room - room containing the device
      type - device type
      state - simulated device state
      lastChanged - time of the last simulated change
